title: Plush Drones
body:
Plush Drones is a decorative mod that adds the plushies from Murder Drones into minecraft. This is my first project so expect some bugs.

They are only obtainable through trading with shephards for now.

With that being said enjoy

![The Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be6733686d1f486d183a1456d428355b4c77855c.png)

My Twitter/X: [https://x.com/cheeselad72](https://x.com/cheeselad72)
